privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro_text: Welcome to Cataito ("we", "our", or "us"). We are committed to protecting your privacy and handling your personal information with care. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard information when you visit our website at cataito.com (the "Site").
privacy.collect_auto_text: When you access our Site, we may automatically collect:
collect_auto_items: Pages visited and time spent on each page
privacy.collect_user_text: When you submit an AI tool through our submission form, we collect the tool name, URL, description, and category that you voluntarily provide.
use_items: Improve user experience and site performance
Display relevant advertisements through third-party services
privacy.third_text: Our Site uses the following third-party services:
third_items: Google Analytics - To analyze website traffic and usage patterns
Google Favicon Service - To display website icons for AI tools
Cloudflare - For CDN and security services
Formsubmit - For processing user resource submissions
privacy.third_text2: These services may collect and process data according to their own privacy policies. We encourage you to review their policies.
privacy.cookies_text: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to enhance your experience on our Site. You can control cookie settings through your browser preferences.
privacy.links_text: Our Site contains links to external AI tools and services. We are not responsible for the privacy practices or content of these external sites. We encourage you to read the privacy policies of any website you visit.
privacy.security_text: We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.
privacy.rights_text: Depending on your location, you may have the right to:
rights_items: Access the personal data we hold about you
Object to or restrict data processing
privacy.rights_text2: To exercise these rights, please contact us using the information below.
privacy.children_text: Our Site is not intended for children under 13 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13.
privacy.changes_text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated "Last updated" date. Continued use of the Site after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised policy.
privacy.contact_text: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.general_text: The information provided on Cataito (the "Site") is for general informational purposes only. While we strive to keep the information up to date and accurate, we make no representations or warranties of any kind, express or implied, about the completeness, accuracy, reliability, suitability, or availability of the information, products, services, or related graphics contained on the Site.
disclaimer.endorse_text: Cataito is an independent directory and does not endorse, recommend, or guarantee any AI tools, services, or products listed on this Site. The inclusion of any tool does not imply our approval or recommendation. Users should conduct their own research before using any listed service.
disclaimer.links_text: The Site contains links to external websites and services. We do not control the content, privacy practices, or terms of use of these external sites. Clicking on any third-party link means you are leaving our Site, and we are not responsible for:
links_items: The accuracy or reliability of content on external sites
The privacy practices of external sites
Any damages or losses resulting from your use of external sites
Changes in availability or functionality of listed tools
disclaimer.pricing_text: AI tools listed on our Site may change their features, pricing, or availability at any time without notice. We do not guarantee that any tool will remain free, functional, or accessible. Users should verify current pricing and features directly with the tool providers.
disclaimer.submit_text: Users may submit AI tools for inclusion on our Site. We do not verify the accuracy, legality, or safety of submitted tools. Submission does not guarantee inclusion, and we reserve the right to remove any listing at our discretion.
disclaimer.risks_text: When using AI tools listed on our Site, please be aware that:
risks_items: AI-generated content may be inaccurate or incomplete
Your data may be processed according to each tool's own privacy policy
Some tools may have terms of service that affect your rights
AI tools should not be used as a substitute for professional advice
disclaimer.ads_text: The Site may display advertisements served by third-party advertising networks (such as Google AdSense). These advertisements are selected and served by third parties, and we are not responsible for the content, accuracy, or opinions expressed in such advertising.
disclaimer.liability_text: In no event shall Cataito, its owners, operators, or affiliates be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or exemplary damages, including but not limited to:
liability_items: Damages for loss of profits, goodwill, data, or other intangible losses
Damages resulting from your use or inability to use the Site
Damages resulting from any reliance on information provided on the Site
Damages resulting from unauthorized access to or alteration of your data
disclaimer.trademark_text: All trademarks, logos, brand names, and service marks displayed on the Site are the property of their respective owners. Their use does not imply any affiliation with or endorsement by these owners. Cataito respects the intellectual property rights of others.
disclaimer.changes_text: We reserve the right to modify this Disclaimer at any time. Changes will be effective immediately upon posting on the Site. Your continued use of the Site constitutes acceptance of any modifications.
disclaimer.contact_text: If you have any questions about this Disclaimer, please contact us at:
